aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited conversational content and missing structured data. While they have a strong local presence, their website lacks the depth needed for AI to confidently recommend them for specific queries.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and installation processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate hours. However, the Q&A section is inactive, and there are no recent posts.
critical_issues: Lack of recent posts or updates.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected. The business information is consistent across all platforms.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips, cost estimates, and service comparisons.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema with detailed answers to common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on energy efficiency, maintenance, and installation.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are crucial for AI assistants to cite their expertise.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach focuses on creating structured, conversational content and implementing schema markup to ensure AI assistants recognize and recommend your business for relevant queries.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in the AI-driven search landscape.

opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
